attempted_route: EPSG:32720, buffer(5500), dissolve, buffer(0) repair on both layers, gpd.clip, then (deforested_in_buffer.area / total_deforested_area) * 100 — round-1 recipe followed exactly including buffer(0) fix
observation: Script ran without error, produced 99.49%; evaluator MAE=206.58, indicating the computed value is ~206 percentage points from ground truth — wrong denominator used.
rationale: Task asks for deforestation percentage *within the buffer zone*, i.e., (deforested_in_buffer.area / roads_buffer_dissolved.area) * 100. Both rounds used total_deforested_area as denominator, which is the wrong reference area and not what the task specifies.
recommended_alternative: Replace denominator: compute buffer_area = roads_buffer_dissolved.geometry.area.sum() after dissolve+buffer(0), then percentage = (deforested_in_buffer.geometry.area.sum() / buffer_area) * 100. All other steps (EPSG:32720, buffer(5500), dissolve, buffer(0) repair, gpd.clip, CSV column name) remain unchanged.
